11:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"From Zep"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Import memories from ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.getzep.com","children":"Zep"}]," into Mnemosyne. Zep is a cloud-hosted enterprise memory platform with a temporal knowledge graph. Because Zep has no bulk export API, extraction happens session by session."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"One Command"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The importer automatically discovers all users, iterates their sessions, and pulls memory, facts, and summaries from each."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Imported"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session Messages"}]," → Working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_message\""}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," from the message sender"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Entity Facts"}]," → Working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_fact\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session Summaries"}]," → Working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_summary\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal Graph Facts"}]," → Mnemosyne triples (via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}],")"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Filter by specific user\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx --user-id alice\n\n# Limit sessions (useful for large accounts)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx --max-sessions 50\n\n# Dry run\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Important: No Bulk Export"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Zep has no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"export_all()"}]," or bulk download endpoint. The importer works by:"]}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Listing all users via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"client.user.list_ordered()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"For each user, listing all sessions"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["For each session, calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"client.memory.get(session_id)"}]," to pull messages, facts, and summaries"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["This means extraction time scales with your session count. If you have thousands of sessions, use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--max-sessions"}]," to limit the run, or process users in batches."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Agentic Fallback"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If the Zep importer cannot extract everything (network limits, API constraints), use the agentic fallback:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Generate a migration script for your Zep data\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-script\n\n# Generate instructions for your AI agent to handle the migration\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --agentic\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"SDK Dependencies"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install zep-cloud\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep Source"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Message ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"role"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"role_type"}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"human"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]," = ",["$","code",null,{"children":"human"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"role"}]," / ","$L3"," → ","$L4","/","$L5"]}],"$L6"]}],"$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb"]}]]}],"\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld"],["$Le"],"$Lf"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
3:["$","code",null,{"children":"role_type"}]
4:["$","code",null,{"children":"assistant"}]
5:["$","code",null,{"children":"agent"}]
6:["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]," = ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent"}]]}]
7:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Message ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]}]]}]
8:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Session ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]}]]}]
9:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"timestamp preserved in metadata"}]]}]
a:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Facts (entity triples)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne triples"}]]}]
b:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Session summary"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_summary\""}]]}]]}]
c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import ZepImporter\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\nimporter = ZepImporter(\n    api_key=\"sk-xxx\",\n    user_id=\"alice\",          # optional filter\n    max_sessions=50,          # limit to recent sessions\n)\n\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne, dry_run=True)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\nprint(f\"Skipped: {result.skipped}, Failed: {result.failed}\")\n"}]}]

f:["$","$L10",null,{"children":["$","$11",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@12"}]}]
